title: ProactiveSchedulerвҶ’Sequencer callback зӣҙ enqueue contract й”Ғе®ҡ

contract.fallback_sync_run: зјә enqueue вҶ’ еҗҢжӯҘ seq.run([nod_action]), дёҚиө·зәҝзЁӢ
contract.exception_fail_soft: enqueue жҠӣејӮеёё вҶ’ warn-once, дёҚеӣһйҖҖ run, proactive emit дёҚйҳ»ж–ӯ

source_code_note: жәҗз Ғж”№йҖ е·ІеңЁ robot-009 иҗҪең° (coco/proactive.py:1226-1283). robot-015 дёә verify-only contract й”Ғе®ҡ + docstring й”Ғе®ҡ + evidence еӣәеҢ–.
